content_body:
Offering a plethora of experiences, Blue Ridge, GA is the perfect destination for a week-long getaway or a quick weekend trip. For those looking to press pause on the normal routine and enjoy a brief break, deciding how to maximize your time in the mountains can seem daunting. Take a look at our recommendations for spending a cabin trip in North Georgia!

Day 1:

Arrive in Blue Ridge around lunch to enjoy the afternoon exploring before checking in to your luxury cabin rental. While in town, peruse the boutique shops downtown before heading to the grocery store for a few essentials. From there, head to your cabin around the time for check-in. Spend some time unwinding before a lovely dinner at Ferraro's Kitchen. At the end of the evening, soak your cares away in the hot tub, play a game of pool, or sink into the comfiest mattress you have slept on.

Day 2:

When you arise from your beauty sleep the next morning, wake up slowly and enjoy every moment of drinking coffee on the porch. From there, head to Mercier Orchards, a 300-acre apple orchard founded in 1943. Stroll around the grounds, browse their home goods and kitchen items, and make sure not to leave without trying one of their fried apple pies! Depending on the season you are visiting, check out their U-Pick schedule!

From there, head down the road about 10 minutes to Bear Claw Vineyards for a wine tasting. North Georgia wineries abound in Blue Ridge, and Bear Claw's stunning grounds and wine selection make this a must on your weekend getaway. After enjoying some fine wine, savor a flavorful pasta dish or artisan pizza at Masseria Kitchen & Bar.

To cap off your fun-filled day, catch a movie at The Swan Drive-In! One of three drive-ins left in Georgia, this historically rich attraction is the perfect way to end your evening. Turn the back of your SUV into a cozy space to enjoy the latest film with your loved ones.

Day 3:

Though your time in Blue Ridge is nearing the end, enjoy two last locations on your North Georgia vacation. After checking out of your luxury cabin, head to Fall Branch Falls because no mountain getaway would be complete without a hike. This quick and easy trail leads to a stunning waterfall tucked in the Aska Adventure Area, making it the perfect last stop on your weekend itinerary. From there, head to Mountain Mama's Coffee Lounge for a refreshing caffeinated beverage to fuel your trip home. As you travel back home, start planning your next cabin trip to Blue Ridge to experience the other activities North Georgia has to offer!
title: A Quick Weekend Getaway in Blue Ridge, GA
